latest.title: U.S. strikes Iran after Trump accuses Tehran of ceasefire violation in Strait of Hormuz
latest.summary: The attack comes as the United States and Iran are supposed to be engaging in a 60-period of no hostilities as they hold talks to end their war.

latest.summary: Hundreds are still feared trapped under the rubble, as international rescue teams start to arrive.

latest.title: Future generations being failed if more trees not planted, experts say
latest.summary: Statistics show the number of trees being planted is increasing, but conservationists say it is not meeting targets.

radar.title: U.S. Says It Struck Iran in Retaliation for Attack on Vessel in Strait of Hormuz
radar.summary: President Trump on Friday called Iran’s attack on a container ship transiting the Strait of Hormuz a day earlier a “foolish” act.

radar.title: Walmart heir Lukas Walton buys minority stake in the Chicago Bulls and United Center
radar.summary: Lukas Walton is the 39-year-old grandson of Walmart founder Sam Walton. He and his wife, Samantha, are residents of Chicago.

radar.title: US conducts strikes on Iran after attack on cargo ship
radar.summary: US Central Command says it has struck missile and drone storage facilities and coastal radar positions.
